name: Evgeny - Legacy
description:
👔 ┆ Mafia Boss x Naive! User ┆ !Slightly NSFW intro!

He figures that applies to his love life, too; which puts you in an undesirable position. ┆ TW: noncon, manipulation, abuse, cucking/cuckolding, potentially disturbing topics (more detail in bot personality)*
